mapper.select: SELECT al.event_type AS type, DATE_FORMAT(al.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(al.note, al.event_type) AS title, CASE WHEN al.old_value IS NOT NULL OR al.new_value IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(al.old_value, '(없음)'), ' → ', COALESCE(al.new_value, '(없음)')) ELSE NULL END AS detail, CASE al.event_type WHEN 'ATTENDANCE' THEN COALESCE(al.status, '출석') WHEN 'MEMBER_CREATE' THEN '등록' WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_ASSIGN' THEN '등록' WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_UPDATE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_DELETE' THEN '삭제' WHEN 'CLASS_ASSIGN' THEN '배정' WHEN 'INFO_CHANGE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'POSTPONEMENT_REQUEST' THEN '대기' WHEN 'POSTPONEMENT_APPROVE' THEN '승인' WHEN 'POSTPONEMENT_REJECT' THEN '반려' WHEN 'REFUND_REQUEST' THEN '대기' WHEN 'REFUND_APPROVE' THEN '승인' WHEN 'REFUND_REJECT' THEN '반려' ELSE al.event_type END AS status FROM member_activity_log al WHERE al.member_seq = #{memberSeq} ORDER BY al.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT al.event_type AS type, DATE_FORMAT(al.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(al.note, al.event_type) AS title, CASE WHEN al.old_value IS NOT NULL OR al.new_value IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(al.old_value, '(없음)'), ' → ', COALESCE(al.new_value, '(없음)')) ELSE NULL END AS detail, CASE al.event_type WHEN 'ATTENDANCE' THEN COALESCE(al.status, '출석') WHEN 'STATUS_CHANGE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'CLASS_ASSIGN' THEN '배정' WHEN 'INFO_CHANGE' THEN '변경' WHEN 'REFUND_CHANGE' THEN '변경' ELSE al.event_type END AS status FROM member_activity_log al WHERE al.member_seq = #{staffSeq} ORDER BY al.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
